The '''''Gladiator''-class assault fighter''' was a one-man [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[FreiTek Incorporated/Legends|FreiTek Inc.]] and used by [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Fenn Shysa]]'s [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] near the end of his reign.

==Characteristics==
It was said to resemble a [[Rattataki/Legends|Rattatakian]] [[Rattatakian short sword|short sword]] thrust through the hilt of a [[Tlönian]] [[Tlönian escutcheon|escutcheon]].

The ''Gladiator'' had no [[Navigation computer/Legends|nav computer]]. They would travel in packs of four with a [[Pursuer-class enforcement ship|''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship]], which would [[Slave circuit|slave]] the Gladiator's systems for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.

It was more maneuverable than an [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighter]], and armed with J3F [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and an [[ArMek/Legends|ArMek]] SW-12c [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''
